case_title: AMERICAN GENERAL FINANCIAL CENTER THRIFT CO VS LACOURSE ROSE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AMERICAN GENERAL FINANCIAL CENTER THRIFT CO AS TO DEFENDANT LACOURSE ROSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-30-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
